article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks non-market rental units at 5938 Olive Avenue into affordability
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14770 on November 25, 2025, authorizing a legally binding Housing Agreement with Olive Properties Inc. that restricts designated non-market rental units at 5938 Olive Avenue to affordable housing tenure in perpetuity.
briefs.action_required: Review the Housing Agreement terms to ensure full compliance with non-market rental obligations before occupancy.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025
